attributes.name: Description
attributes.value: With 60% less fat and 40% fewer calories than regular chips, this is healthy snacking with a tropical twist. Made from 100% non-GMO corn and air-popped (never fried or baked), these light, crunchy chips are coated in a smoky Hawaiian barbeque seasoning for a bold, island-inspired bite. Gluten-free, vegan, and packed with flavor—snacking smart has never tasted this good.

Gluten-free, vegan, and packed with flavor—snacking smart has never tasted this good.

subtitle.text:
Made using Popped Technology, not fried, not baked, for a unique airy crunch and light texture

Crafted with 100% corn and 60% less fat than average chips for a smarter, guilt-free snack

Only 121 kcal per serving with no palm oil, no trans fat, and no gluten

Naturally gluten-free, made with non-GMO corn, whole grain, and just 3 clean ingredients: corn, a little oil, and seasoning

Corn (78%), Edible Vegetable Oil (Rice Bran Oil), Seasoning [Maltodextrin, Sugar, Dehydrated Vegetables (Onion, Garlic, Tomato), Iodized Salt, Thickeners (INS 1422), Dextrose, Hydrolyzed Protein (Corn), Mixed Spices, Edible Vegetable Oil (Sunflower Oil), Anticaking Agent (INS 551), Flavour Enhancer (INS 627 & 631), Acidity Regulator (INS 330), Emulsifier (INS 322), Rosemary Extract (INS 392).

With 60% less fat and 40% fewer calories than regular chips, this is healthy snacking with a tropical twist. Made from 100% non-GMO corn and air-popped (never fried or baked), these light, crunchy chips are coated in a smoky Hawaiian barbeque seasoning for a bold, island-inspired bite. Gluten-free, vegan, and packed with flavor—snacking smart has never tasted this good.

Per 28g serving: Energy 127 Kcal, Protein 2.2g, Carbohydrates 21g, Total Sugars 0g, Added Sugars 0g, Dietary Fibre 0.9g, Total Fat 3.9g, Saturated Fat 1.7g, Trans Fat 0g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 125mg.
Manufactured in a facility that also processes nuts and milk products. Contains soy.
